full_text:
The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H).

Dispase dissociation media included 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer.

RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++ for dispase dissociated and with 5 ml for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++ for sequentially dissociated.

After RBC lysis and centrifugation, the sequentially dissociated cells looked slightly pink, so redid RBC lysis with 2 ml + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++.

The final pellet was resuspended in 5 ml or 2 ml of media (dispase and sequential respectively). For counting, a 1:10 dilution of the cell suspension was made.

Cell counts:

Made 1 aliquot with 1.5 E6 cells from the dispase dissociated cells

Made 1 aliquot with 1.5 E6 cells from the sequentially dissociated cells: unpurified MC

Took 50.175 E6 cells for enrichment with negative isolation.

Biobanking

Dispase: 3x 5E6 cells and 5x 10E6

Sequential: 5x 10E6

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

Magnetic-activated cell sorting (MACS)

The enrichment was done together with the S523_pOme sample

Enriched CAFs from the dispase+C&H dissociated cell suspension using negative isolation.

Negative isolation: Depleting the sample from cancer and immune cells using a mixture of anti-EpCAM (Miltenyi, Cat: 130-061-101) and anti-CD45 (TIL) beads (Miltenyi, Cat: 130-118-780), and an LS column in a QuadroMACS separator.

Anti-fibroblast MicroBeads, CD326 (EpCAM) MicroBeads, and CD45 MicroBeads protocols by Miltenyi Biotec were used as guidance.

MACS buffer was prepared as follows: 49.55 ml DPBS (w/o MgCl2 and CaCl2) + 250 µl FBS + 200 µl EDTA to have 0.5 % FBS and 2 mM EDTA in DPBS. MACS buffer was prepared sterile and sterile-filtered before using it.

MACS buffer, cells, and beads were kept on ice.

Everything was done inside a laminar hood to keep the cells sterile.

Used 33.45 E6 cells from the sequentially dissociated fraction.

Centrifuged the cells at 300 g for 10 min at +4C.

The pellet was resuspended in 3.66.2 µl of cold MACS buffer (calculation: the desired volume [500 µl] - the volume of both beads [2x 66.9 µl]). Added 66.9 µl of both anti-EpCAM and anti-CD45 beads to the cell suspension and incubated 30 min at +4C shielded from light. Washed the cells with 3 ml MACS buffer and centrifuged 300 g for 10 min at +4C. Lastly, the cells were resuspended in 500 µl of MACS buffer.

Placed LS columns and 30 µm filters in the magnetic MACS Separator. Prepared them by washing them with 3 ml of MACS buffer, then applied the cell suspension onto the column, and washed with 3 x 3 ml MACS buffer.

Columns were removed from the separator and placed on a new 15 ml falcon tube. 5 ml MACS buffer was added to the column and with firmly pushing the plunger into the column, magnetically labeled cells were flushed out.

All cell suspensions were centrifuged 300 g for 10 min and then resuspended in 2 ml or 1 ml of PBS (column bound and flowthrough, respectively). Counted the cells.

Took 1.5 E6 cells from column bound fraction and all 0.8505 E6 cells from flowthrough to flow cytometry.

Biobanked 2x ~5E6 cells from column bound fraction.

Flow cytometry

The staining was done together with S523_pOme sample

The conditions to stain were:

unpurified

dispase dissociated cells

negative isolation, flow-through

negative isolation, column bound

The aliquots were stained with the antibodies from the fibroblast panel according to the protocol.
